Hoolheyak:Analysis.NAME: Analysis
DESCRIPTIONS: A value used to enhance specific effects.

Hoolheyak:Meander.NAME: Meander
DESCRIPTIONS: For every #b
Skills played, deal #b3 damage to a random enemy and apply #b1 Lift. Current progress: #b
. NL Triggers a number of times equal to your Analysis.

Hoolheyak:Erudition.NAME: Erudition
DESCRIPTIONS: For every #b
Attacks played, deal damage to a random enemy equal to your Analysis and apply #b1 Lift. Current progress: #b
. NL Triggers #b4 times.

Hoolheyak:Gravity.NAME: Gravity
DESCRIPTIONS: An innate property, equal to #b10% of Max HP (rounded down). Current Gravity: #b
. NL When the target's Lift reaches this value, triggers Levitate.

Hoolheyak:Lift.NAME: Lift
DESCRIPTIONS: When stacks reach Gravity, clears all stacks and triggers Levitate.

Hoolheyak:Levitate.NAME: Levitate
DESCRIPTIONS: Loses all Block and gains #b20 Deconstruction. Damage taken is increased by #b50% , and damage dealt is decreased by #b70% . NL At the end of the turn, takes (Gravity + Lift) × 2 damage, then removes this status and clears all Lift.

Hoolheyak:Weightless.NAME: Weightless
DESCRIPTIONS: Lift gained is doubled. At the end of the turn, reduces stacks by #b1 .

Hoolheyak:DistilledTimePower.NAME: Distilled Time
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, gain #b
random Attack, Skill, or Power potion(s).

Hoolheyak:InheritedEndPower.NAME: Inherited End
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you alternate playing Attacks and Skills, gain #b
Energy and draw #b
card(s).

Hoolheyak:RedundantExperimentPower.NAME: Redundant Experiment
DESCRIPTIONS: This turn, #b
specified card(s) will be played when discarded.

Hoolheyak:BygoneWingsPower.NAME: Bygone Wings
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you play #b1 card of a different color, #b1 random card in your hand costs #b
less.

Hoolheyak:InheritedMemoriesPower.NAME: Inherited Memories
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you trigger Meander or Erudition, gain #b
Analysis.

HoolheyakMod:ForbiddenKnowledgeEru.NAME: Forbidden Knowledge: Erudition
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever #yErudition is triggered, draw #b
card(s).

HoolheyakMod:ForbiddenKnowledgeMea.NAME: Forbidden Knowledge: Meander
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever #yMeander is triggered, deal #b
damage to ALL enemies.

Hoolheyak:EntropyIncrease.NAME: Entropy Increase
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, add #b
#yPower card(s) of a random color to your hand.

Hoolheyak:CovenantStrength.NAME: Ancient Covenant: Strength
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever Erudition is triggered, gain #b
Strength.

Hoolheyak:CovenantDexterity.NAME: Ancient Covenant: Dexterity
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever Meander is triggered, gain #b
Dexterity.

Hoolheyak:Wardrobe.NAME: Kukulkan's Wardrobe
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you play a card of a different color, add #b
random card(s) of your color to your hand and give it Exhaust.
It costs #b0 this combat.

Hoolheyak:OmniscientHorizon.NAME: Omniscient Horizon
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever an enemy Levitates, gain #b
Energy and draw #b
card(s).

Hoolheyak:SerpentBloodline.NAME: Serpent Bloodline
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain Ritual equal to your Analysis. Whenever you gain Analysis, gain Ritual equal to #b
times that amount. NL At the start of each turn, lose #b
Energy.

Hoolheyak:DistantLight.NAME: Distant Light
DESCRIPTIONS: At the end of your turn, if damage dealt this turn is less than #b6 , trigger Meander and Erudition.

Hoolheyak:CorrectedVariable.NAME: Corrected Variable
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you draw a Status card, gain #b1 Erudition; whenever you draw a Curse card, gain #b1 Meander.

Hoolheyak:Byproduct.NAME: Byproduct
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you perform a Variable, gain #b
random card(s).
upgraded random card(s).

Hoolheyak:ComplementaryExperiment.NAME: Complementary Experiment
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you perform a Variable, gain #b
Block.

Hoolheyak:KukulkanLegacyPower.NAME: Kukulkan's Legacy
DESCRIPTIONS: The trigger limits of Erudition and Meander are increased by #b
. NL Damage dealt and Lift applied are multiplied by #b

Hoolheyak:Deconstruction.NAME: Deconstruction
DESCRIPTIONS: The next time you gain Block, consume an equal number of stacks to offset #b
Block.

Hoolheyak:Conjunction.NAME: Aspect: Conjunction
DESCRIPTIONS: #yNeutral #yAspect. NL All characters deal #b50% more damage.

Hoolheyak:Quincunx.NAME: Aspect: Quincunx
DESCRIPTIONS: #yNeutral #yAspect. NL Skills provide #yErudition, Attacks provide #yMeander.

Hoolheyak:Sextile.NAME: Aspect: Sextile
DESCRIPTIONS: #bHarmonious #bAspect. NL #yErudition and #yMeander trigger limits are reduced by #b2 . But you can no longer apply #yLift.

Hoolheyak:Trine.NAME: Aspect: Trine
DESCRIPTIONS: #bHarmonious #bAspect. NL At the start of your turn, gain an extra [E] and draw #b2 cards. All Attacks gain #yExhaust.

Hoolheyak:Square.NAME: Aspect: Square
DESCRIPTIONS: #rChallenging #rAspect. NL Whenever you play a card, lose #b1 HP and apply #b1 #yLift to ALL enemies.

Hoolheyak:Opposition.NAME: Aspect: Opposition
DESCRIPTIONS: #rChallenging #rAspect. NL You cannot gain #yBlock. The #yGravity of ALL enemies is halved.

Hoolheyak:PureWater.NAME: Pure Water is Life
DESCRIPTIONS: While alive, diverts damage taken by you to itself. Revives #b3 turns after dying.

Hoolheyak:EnemyPureWater.NAME: Pure Water is Life
DESCRIPTIONS: Turns into a puddle of water upon taking fatal damage, revives after #b3 turns. Dies completely if all Flowing Shapes or #yMuelsyse are defeated.
